site.title: Risk, Finance & Board Radar
site.tagline: Senior risk, finance, exec & board roles — Sydney, remote-AU, interstate boards. Refreshed twice daily.

digests.posture: 66 roles · 27 strong-act · Friday 08:00 run — quiet open to the week. Robert Half's Sydney risk/compliance desk (39 live cards) was re-verified in Chrome and showed nothing newer than the 6 Jul 'Senior Compliance Manager | High Growth Lender' already logged; Seek's freshest 'head of risk' and 'governance' listings this morning were off-target (power-grid, quality, ads-policy). All still-live prior items carry forward, led by INTEC Energy Solutions' Chief Financial Officer (AU/NZ, Sydney) and Steadfast Group's 'Head of Finance & Business Partnering' — both direct matches to your energy and insurance strengths.

66 roles · 27 strong-act · afternoon refresh, market quiet since 08:00 — the day's standout stays Steadfast Group's 'Head of Finance & Business Partnering' (Australia's largest general-insurance broker network, CPA-essential, direct fit to your FCPA/insurance strength). The Robert Half Sydney risk/compliance desk was re-verified live in Chrome this run and Seek's recent-listing queries returned no new senior risk/finance/governance roles in the ~5 hours since the morning run, so all morning items carry forward live.

60 roles · 25 strong-act · Wednesday 14:00 refresh — no new on-target roles surfaced since the 08:00 run. Robert Half's Sydney risk/compliance desk (15 live cards) was re-verified in Chrome and showed nothing newer than the 6 Jul 'Senior Compliance Manager | High Growth Lender' already logged; Seek's freshest risk listings this afternoon were off-target (pharma/health). This morning's leads stand, led by INTEC Energy Solutions' CFO (AU/NZ, renewable-energy), the Head of Group Compliance ($240-260k, Talent) and the NSW Climate/Energy/Environment 'Senior Manager, Financial Assurance & Compliance' (Parramatta).

53 roles · 22 strong-act · 2 recruiter day-rate contracts worth fast action — Tuesday afternoon refresh (14:00): no new roles surfaced since the 08:00 run; the full Robert Half Sydney risk/compliance desk (14 live cards) was re-verified in Chrome and nothing was posted this afternoon. Today's leads stand: Inghams 'Head of Internal Audit' (Macquarie Park, ASX-listed, Board Finance & Audit Committee), ACU 'Senior Governance, Risk & Compliance Lead' (North Sydney, hybrid) and the Harding & Drougas 'Chief of Quality, Governance & Risk' C-suite match — all re-confirmed live, along with the Moir CFO, Revesby CRO, Peninsula Head of Compliance & Risk and Shippit interim FC.

51 roles · 20 strong-act · 2 recruiter day-rate contracts worth fast action — Monday afternoon refresh: one fresh §1a recruiter match added (Robert Half 'Senior Compliance Manager | High Growth Lender', $160-180k, posted today and browser-verified live) on top of the still-standout Harding & Drougas 'Chief of Quality, Governance & Risk' C-suite match; the full Robert Half Sydney risk/compliance desk (now x9) was re-verified live in Chrome this run, and the Moir CFO, OneSchool GRC Director, Cuscal SM Finance-Risk contract, Revesby CRO and Shippit interim FC remain live

44 roles · 17 strong-act · 2 interim/contract worth fast action — quiet Sunday morning run: one fresh §1a recruiter day-rate contract (Bluefin Commercial Advisory Manager, Finance Transformation, $800-950/day, 12-month) and a new Robert Half Compliance Manager | Digital Infrastructure ($160-180k) added, while the recruiter-held senior risk/compliance surface (Robert Half x5, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract) plus Moir Group CFO, OneSchool GRC Director and Shippit interim FC were all re-verified live

41 roles · 16 strong-act · morning run — two fresh strong matches posted today (Robert Half Senior Risk & Compliance Manager, tech/infra, $190-220k; Lanson Partners Regulatory Reporting Advisory Senior Manager, $180-210k) on top of the still-live recruiter-held senior risk/compliance surface (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance x2 + Senior Compliance Manager day-rate, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract), with Moir Group CFO, OneSchool Global GRC Director and Shippit interim FC all carried forward live

38 roles · 14 strong-act · morning run — recruiter-held senior risk/compliance remains the fast-action surface (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance x2 + Senior Compliance Manager, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract), with the Moir Group CFO, OneSchool Global GRC Director and Shippit interim FC all re-verified live; two fresh C-suite search leads (a Sydney Water Head of Risk & Compliance and a Wise CRO AU/NZ) were checked and excluded as expired

39 roles · 14 strong-act · afternoon refresh adds two fresh strong matches — a recruiter-held CFO (Moir Group) and a Regional Director of Governance, Risk & Compliance ANZ (OneSchool Global) — on top of the still-live recruiter-held senior risk/compliance surface (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance x2, Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract, Shippit interim FC); senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches

25 roles · 10 strong-act · recruiter-held risk/contract roles still the fast-action surface (Robert Half SM Risk & Compliance x2; Cuscal SM Finance Risk contract) plus Shippit interim FC still live — afternoon refresh adds a fresh Nuix risk & assurance role; senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches

35 roles · 11 strong-act · 4 interim/contract worth fast action (Cuscal, Zurich 9-mth, Shippit, Robert Half FP&A 12-mth FTC) plus a fresh afternoon wave incl. CCSG Head of Risk & Compliance — senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
19 roles · 6 strong-act · 1 interim (Shippit FC) plus 4 recruiter-held senior risk/governance roles worth fast contact — senior-manager risk/governance weighted as core-target matches
18 roles · 8 strong-act · 2 interim/contract worth fast action — senior-manager risk/governance roles weighted as core-target matches
